title: Shiori no Inmu
overview: Shiori, who was injured after parting from her boyfriend, dreamed of being embraced by a mysterious man every night. Shiori is confused but euphoric about the "indecent dream" and becomes bewitching day by day. However, one day the dream man transforms into a terrifying figure and finally appears in reality. What did she see? Is there an end to this nightmare ...? !!

trailers.title: 『シオリノインム』予告編
trailers.channel_name: キングレコード映像制作部
